it('defaultAdapter returns a complete adapter implementation', () => {
Import `MDCTextField` module to instantiate text field component.
* **menu:** Removes 5 adapter methods and adds a new setMaxHeight adapter method; adds anchor positioning API to menu foundation; see README for details.
* **ripple:** `registerDocumentInteractionHandler ` and `deregisterDocumentInteractionHandler` APIs have been added to the ripple adapter.
... on-transition` mixin has been removed, and the `mdc-elevation-transition-rule` function has been renamed to `mdc-elevation-transition-value`, which should be used instead.
* **text-field:** Please implement `hasClass` method on MDCTextFieldAdapter, and change `getFloatingWidth` method to `getWidth` on MDCTextFieldLabelFoundation.
* **drawer:** Renamed `mdc-permanent-drawer` CSS class to `mdc-drawer--permanent`, renamed `mdc-temporary-drawer` CSS class to `mdc-drawer--temporary`, and renamed `mdc-per ...
* **text-field:** - The return type for `MDCTextFieldAdapter.getNativeInput()` has changed. See the 'NativeInputType` typedef in the adapter.
...  Public method `layout()` and adapter methods `getIdleOutlineStyleValue()` and `isRtl()` were added to MDCTextField. Added a new subcomponent MDCTextFieldOutline, and adapt ...
* **text-field:** Pass subelement foundations through MDCTextField super constructor ([#1684](https://github.com/material-c ...
... es DOM requirements. Refer to https://github.com/material-components/material-components-web/blob/master/packages/mdc-select/README.md for new implementation requirements.
* **text-field:** Please update implementations of MDCTextField to pass in a map of subfoundations to the MDCTextFieldFo ...
... ass name "mdc-textfield" is changed to "mdc-text-field", JS objects name "MDCTextfield" is changed to "MDCTextField", .scss file names "mdc-textfield.scss" is changed to "m ...
attribute to the root element with its value set to the component's JavaScript class name (e.g.,
`MDCTextField`). Then, after writing the markup, simply insert a script tag that calls
`mdc.autoInit()`. Make sure you call `mdc.autoInit()` after all scripts are loaded so it works
This will attach an [MDCTextField](../mdc-textfield) instance to the root `<div>` element.
Once `mdc.autoInit()` is called, you can access the component instance via an `MDCTextField`
